title: Reduce Task Merge Management
description: The `task/reduce/MergeThread.java` file houses the `MergeThread` class, which orchestrates concurrent merge operations in Hadoop's reduce phase. It extends Java's `Thread` class, continuously waiting and executing merge tasks. The class maintains a queue of inputs to merge, with methods for initiating and waiting on merge operations. The merging logic resides in the abstract `merge` method, meant to be overridden by subclasses. It collaborates with other Hadoop components, importing necessary exceptions and using Hadoop-specific logger and classification utilities.

DESCRIPTION: The `task/reduce/MergeThread.java` file houses the `MergeThread` class, which orchestrates concurrent merge operations in Hadoop's reduce phase. It extends Java's `Thread` class, continuously waiting and executing merge tasks. The class maintains a queue of inputs to merge, with methods for initiating and waiting on merge operations. The merging logic resides in the abstract `merge` method, meant to be overridden by subclasses.
